title: Yacht Rental in Puerto Banus: Costs, Seasons and Tips for 2026
html:
Puerto Banus in Marbella offers an illustrious departure point for yacht rental on the Costa del Sol, with prices ranging from €400 for a half-day motorboat to €8,000 for a crewed superyacht. BoatHire24 connects you to verified skippers and private owners in this Mediterranean hotspot.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

Most charters start from Puerto Banus marina itself, with its 915 berths and easy access to the Mediterranean. You can also depart from Marbella port, a short 10-minute cruise west, or from Cabopino harbour near Dunas de Artola. For longer trips, the bay of Estepona lies 12 nautical miles to the south-west, and the exclusive island of Gibraltar is a 40-nautical-mile run east. You can browse boats for your dates in a few minutes.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Puerto Banus?

Prices vary widely by boat type, season and duration, but expect to pay from €400 to €8,000 per day. A shared tour typically costs €80 per person for a two-hour trip. A small motorboat for half a day starts around €400. A full-day catamaran charter for up to 12 guests averages €1,200. A crewed luxury yacht with captain and steward starts from €4,000 per day. To compare verified boats and check availability, browse boats for your dates on BoatHire24. One option worth a look is this motor yacht.

  • Shared RIB tour: €80 per person, 2 hours
  • Small motorboat half-day: €400, 4 hours, 6 guests
  • Catamaran full-day: €1,200, 8 hours, 12 guests
  • Crewed luxury yacht (up to 50ft): €4,000, 8 hours, 12 guests

Which boat to rent

BoatHire24 lists a range of vessels in Puerto Banus. Here are the most popular choices.

  1. Motor yacht, ideal for coastal cruising and water sports, up to 12 guests, from €800 half-day. A Fairline 40 model is a common example; see this motor yacht listing for details.
  2. Sailing yacht, perfect for a serene day sail with up to 8 guests, from €600 half-day.
  3. Catamaran, stable and spacious for groups of 12, from €1,200 full-day.
  4. RIB rigid inflatable boat, fast and fun for up to 8 guests, from €250 half-day.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Puerto Banus?

The licence requirement depends on the boat's power and size; for small motorboats under 15hp no licence is needed, but larger vessels require a valid ICC or national equivalent. Charter companies typically provide a skipper if you lack a licence. For sailing yachts over 8 metres, a recognised sailing qualification is usually required. Always check with the operator before booking, as they confirm the exact requirements. You can also see more at browse the listings.

Tip: The afternoon thermal wind known as the Poniente picks up around midday, so plan your morning departure for a calmer cruise along the coast.

When is the best season for yacht rental in Puerto Banus?

High season runs from June to September, with July and August being the busiest and most expensive months. The Levante wind can bring stronger breezes in spring and autumn, but the water remains warm until October. Booking outside August offers lighter crowds and better rates. In 2026, the peak weeks are likely mid-July to early September.

At a glance

  • Price band: €80 person (shared) to €8,000 day (crewered)
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 2 hours to full day
  • Maximum capacity: 12 guests on most vessels
  • Currency: EUR
  • Departure: Puerto Banus marina

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

Can you rent a boat for a week in Puerto Banus?

Yes, many skippers offer weekly charters, especially for longer itineraries to Gibraltar or the Cabo de Gata.

What is the minimum age to rent a boat in Puerto Banus?

There is no minimum age to be a passenger, but the renter or skipper must be at least 18 years old with a valid licence.

Are dogs allowed on boat charters in Puerto Banus?

Some charters permit well-behaved dogs, but you must confirm with the owner when booking.

Can you anchor anywhere along the coast?

Anchoring is allowed in most coves, note that some areas near Marbella are protected; your skipper will know the best spots.

Whether you are hiring a crewed motor yacht for a special occasion or a compact RIB for a family day out, Puerto Banus provides a stunning base for Mediterranean boating. Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
